title: Duzzit Leather Wipes - Nourishes & Protects | 100% Biodegradable - Made From Plant Fibres | Cleans and Shines All Leather - Sofas, Jackets, Bags, Shoes & More (60 Biodegradable Wipes)
features: QUICK & EASY LEATHER CLEANING: These leather wipes offer a fast and fuss-free way to clean everyday marks from sofas, bags, jackets or shoes. Ideal for quick touch-ups or full surface cleans when time is short.

LEATHER SOFA CLEANER ON THE GO: Perfect for keeping leather furniture looking its best, whether freshening up the arms of a sofa or wiping away stains from dining chairs. Just grab a wipe and go – no sprays or cloths needed.
CLEANS & SHINES CAR INTERIORS: Use as car wipes for leather seats, steering wheels or door panels to leave them clean and looking like new. Ideal for regular upkeep or pre-journey spruce-ups.

NOURISHES & PROTECTS LEATHER: These wipes are designed to gently clean while also conditioning and protecting. Ideal for restoring moisture to dry leather jackets, shoes or bags without leaving residue.
MULTI-USE AROUND THE HOME: Great as leather wipes for sofas, chairs and footstools, but also brilliant for smaller items like belts, watch straps or wallets. A true all-rounder in leather care.

100% BIODEGRADABLE MATERIAL: Made with plant-based fibres, these cleaning wipes are kind to the planet as well as your leather. Dispose of responsibly after use, knowing they won’t linger in landfill.
FRESH CITRUS SCENT: Each wipe is infused with a clean, citrus fragrance that leaves leather smelling fresh. Great for deodorising car interiors or freshening up stored bags and coats.
HANDY RESEALABLE PACK: With 60 wipes in each pack, the resealable label helps keep them moist and ready to use whenever needed. Store in the car, utility room or hallway for quick access.
GENTLE BUT EFFECTIVE FORMULA: Safe for use on a wide range of leathers, including delicate finishes. Perfect for everyday maintenance without the worry of damage or dryness.

A MUST-HAVE FOR LEATHER LOVERS: Whether used as a leather cleaner for sofas, a car leather cleaner, or for keeping handbags looking smart, these versatile wipes make leather care simple and satisfying.
description: Product Description Bring tired-looking leather back to life with Duzzit Leather Wipes – the fast and effective way to clean, condition and protect leather surfaces. These 100% biodegradable wipes are made from plant fibres, offering a sustainable solution for keeping leather items looking their best. Designed for use on everything from sofas and handbags to car interiors and leather shoes, each wipe helps remove dirt and grime while leaving behind a natural-looking shine. With a refreshing citrus scent and nourishing formula, these leather cleaning wipes are ideal for daily touch-ups or deeper cleaning sessions. Whether it’s a family leather sofa, a beloved leather jacket, or the car’s leather seats, these wipes leave leather soft, supple and freshly scented. Use them at home, in the car or on the go – all with the confidence of eco-friendly care and premium performance. Ingredients <5% Perfume, Limonene, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Linalyl Acetate, Methylisothiazolinone, Benzisothiazolinone. Directions * Peel back resealable label on the front of pack * Remove wipes as required * Wipe across surface and leave to dry. Do not rub in. * Carefully reseal pack after use to prevent wipes from drying out. Safety Warning DO NOT flush down the toilet. Keep pack resealed to retain moisture. Always test on an inconspicuous area before use. See more
